Spring Data Redis
  1. org.springframework.data.redis.connection

  3. StringTuple

Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.redis.connection.StringRedisConnection.StringTuple

Packages that use StringRedisConnection.StringTuple
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.redis.connection
Connection package providing low-level abstractions for interacting with the various Redis 'drivers'/libraries.

    StringRedisConnection.zRangeByScoreWithScores(@NonNull String key, double min, double max, long offset, long count)
    Get set of Tuples in range from start to end where score is between min and max from sorted set.

    StringRedisConnection.zRevRangeByScoreWithScores(@NonNull String key, double min, double max)
    Get set of Tuple where score is between min and max from sorted set ordered from high to low.

    StringRedisConnection.zRevRangeByScoreWithScores(@NonNull String key, double min, double max, long offset, long count)
    Get set of Tuple in range from start to end where score is between min and max from sorted set ordered high -> low.

    Long
    StringRedisConnection.zAdd(@NonNull String key, Set<StringRedisConnection.StringTuple> tuples)
    Add tuples to a sorted set at key, or update its score if it already exists.
    Long
    StringRedisConnection.zAdd(@NonNull String key, Set<StringRedisConnection.StringTuple> tuples, RedisZSetCommands.ZAddArgs args)
    Add tuples to a sorted set at key, or update its score depending on the given args.
